calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-11-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-15-2024 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-30-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated October 26, 2002 is admitted to probate. Oscar F. Lumba is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for September 30, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Amy Harrington is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.
